qry:select.name: THREAD
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select I.oi_wf, T.oi_instance, T.oi_inst_child, T.oi_thread, T.oi_node, T.f_inicio, T.f_ejecucion, T.f_advertencia, T.f_vencimiento, T.c_estado, T.c_asign_rol, T.d_asign_titulo, T.d_asign_etty, T.d_asign_ayn, T.d_deleg_etty, T.d_deleg_ayn, T.o_deleg_coment, N.d_label, N.c_type from wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk01_nodes as N join I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, N.oi_node inner T.oi_node where T.oi_thread={#SOURCE:@oi_thread} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INSTANCE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select I.oi_instance, I.d_instance, I.d_owner_ayn, I.d_owner_mail, I.d_owner_tel, I.d_owner_rol, I.c_estado_ej, I.c_estado_wf, I.f_inicio, I.f_advertencia, I.f_vencimiento, I.f_fin, I.e_pasos, W.oi_wf, W.d_wf from wrk02_instances as I, wrk01_wf as W join I.oi_wf inner W.oi_wf where I.oi_instance={#SOURCE:@oi_instance} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTADO
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WE.c_estado, WE.d_estado, WE.c_color, WE.l_pause, WE.l_stop, WE.l_delete from wrk01_estados as WE where WE.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/../@oi_wf} and WE.c_estado={$SOURCE/@c_estado_wf}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FORM
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WF.d_form from wrk01_forms as WF, wrk01_nodes as WN join WF.c_form inner WN.d_param_1 where WF.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/@oi_wf} and WN.oi_node = {$SOURCE/@oi_node}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: THREADS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select I.oi_wf, T.oi_instance, T.oi_inst_child, T.oi_thread, T.oi_node, T.f_inicio, T.f_ejecucion, T.f_advertencia, T.f_vencimiento, T.c_estado, T.c_asign_rol, T.d_asign_titulo, T.d_asign_etty, T.d_asign_ayn, T.d_deleg_etty, T.d_deleg_ayn, T.o_deleg_coment, N.d_label, N.c_type from wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk01_nodes as N join I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, N.oi_node inner T.oi_node where T.oi_instance={iif($SOURCE/@oi_inst_child=\'\',$SOURCE/@oi_instance,$SOURCE/@oi_inst_child)} and T.c_estado!=\'D\' and T.c_estado!=\'I\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ROLE-DETAIL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread, U.c_rol, U.d_etty from WRK02_THREADS as T, WRK02_USERS as U join T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread where U.l_resolve = 1 and U.f_resolve < {Now()} and U.c_rol = {$SOURCE/@c_rol} and T.oi_thread = {$SOURCE/@oi_thread}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: REPORTS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select R.e_orden, R.o_text from wrk02_report as R where R.oi_instance={$SOURCE/../@oi_instance} order by e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LOGS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select L.oi_log, L.c_tipo, L.oi_node, L.o_comentario, L.f_accion, N.c_type, E.oi_etapa from WRK02_LOGS as L, WRK02_ETAPA as E, WRK01_NODES as N join L.oi_node left outer N.oi_node, L.oi_log left outer E.oi_log
where L.oi_instance={$SOURCE/../@oi_instance} order by f_accion DESC, oi_log DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LOG-DETAIL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select L.oi_log, L.c_tipo, L.oi_node, L.o_comentario, L.f_accion, N.c_type, E.f_inicio as ET_f_inicio, E.f_resolucion as ET_f_resolucion, E.d_entidad as ET_d_entidad, E.d_entidad_ayn as ET_d_entidad_ayn, E.o_coment as ET_o_coment from WRK02_LOGS as L, WRK02_ETAPA as E, WRK01_NODES as N join L.oi_node left outer N.oi_node, L.oi_log inner E.oi_log where L.oi_log={$SOURCE/@oi_log} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ETAPAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select L.oi_log, L.c_tipo, L.oi_node, L.o_comentario, L.f_accion, N.c_type, N.d_label, E.oi_etapa, E.f_inicio as ET_f_inicio, E.f_resolucion as ET_f_resolucion, E.d_entidad as ET_d_entidad, E.d_entidad_ayn as ET_d_entidad_ayn, E.o_coment as ET_o_coment from WRK02_LOGS as L, WRK02_ETAPA as E, WRK01_NODES as N join L.oi_node left outer N.oi_node, L.oi_log inner E.oi_log where L.oi_instance={$SOURCE/../@oi_instance} order by f_accion DESC, oi_log DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FORM-DETAIL
DELEGA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
select T.oi_thread, N.c_rol, N.c_puede_deleg from wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_users as U, WRK01_ROLES_NODE as N join T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread, T.oi_node inner N.oi_node, U.c_rol inner N.c_rol where T.oi_thread={%= $SOURCE/@oi_thread %} and N.c_puede_deleg!=\'NO\'
UNION
select T.oi_thread, N.c_rol, N.c_puede_deleg from wrk02_threads as T, WRK01_ROLES_NODE as N join T.oi_node inner N.oi_node, T.c_asign_rol inner N.c_rol where T.oi_thread={%= $SOURCE/@oi_thread %} and N.c_puede_deleg!=\'NO\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DELEGA_ERROR

xsl:choose.xsl:when: Esperando a que Finalize el Workflow.

td.span: Se ha exedido el tiempo de espera, es posible que exista algun problema con el Subproceso, puede marcarlo con error haciendo click
Se ha exedido el tiempo de ejecucion, es posible que exista algun problema con el Subproceso, puede marcarlo con error haciendo click

xsl:if.span: No hay Personas Definidas, puede asignar personas haciendo click
